title: Our work - Ministry of Education
content:
About the work we do, who we are, and the policies and legislation that guide the education sector.
- Strategies, policies and programmes
- Information releases

## Sections under this audience
Learn about our role and who we are, New Zealand's education system, and how to contact us.

### Strategies, policies and programmes
Information about the strategies and policies guiding the work we do.

### Information releases
Information we release proactively, including ministerial advice and responses to requests under the Official Information Act.
Information about the legislation governing our education system and legislative changes affecting schools, kura and early learning services.
Publications and documents published by the Ministry of Education.
